Validated_Value: The ACC Annual Scientific Session & Expo is the premier cardiology conference in the Americas; attracting thousands of cardiovascular professionals. Accepted abstracts are published in the Journal of the American College of Cardiology. All submitting authors must have updated disclosures before submitting research. The conference features a wide variety of submission categories; including Young Investigator Awards; abstracts across 10 learning pathways; Spotlight on Special Topics; Complex Clinical Cases; Interventional Challenging Cases; and Late-Breaking Clinical Trials. Companies with international presence or products in development are welcome to exhibit. Poster presenters must display their poster on the appropriate board for the entire scheduled session and be physically present for the scheduled presentation time. Disclosure information for all authors must be included on the poster. For moderated poster sessions; presenters upload a PDF of a traditional flat board poster to the ePoster system; printed posters are not required for moderated sessions unless also presenting a traditional poster. Presenters receive instructions for uploading via email in early February. For traditional poster sessions; a printed poster is required onsite. Presenters are expected to adhere to all ACC policies and guidelines.

Validated_Value: Posters must be submitted as electronic posters (ePosters) in PDF format; created in PowerPoint (1 page; landscape; 16:9 layout). The poster must include title; author(s); address (upper edge); purpose; methods; results; and conclusions. Use of the official ESC logo is not allowed. Declaration of interest is mandatory but will be inserted automatically by ESC services. QR codes are not permitted. Text should be broken up with drawings/photos; and color is recommended for attractiveness. Upload deadline is strict and will be specified for each congress; after the deadline; no changes are allowed.

Validated_Value: Heart Failure 2026 is the next major congress in the field; hosted by the European Society of Cardiology (ESC) in Barcelona; Spain. The event covers the entire spectrum of heart failure; from prevention to diagnosis and treatment. All delegates can access presentations on-demand for a limited period after the event. Membership in the Heart Failure Association of the ESC provides year-round access to congress resources on ESC 365. Certificates of Attendance and CME Credits are available for both onsite and online delegates. Industry participation is allowed but with some restrictions—details are available on the official website. Poster guidelines are strict: ePosters must be in PDF format; created in PowerPoint (1 page; landscape; 16:9); and include specific sections; use of the ESC logo is not allowed; and QR codes are prohibited. The upload deadline is strict and will be specified for each congress.

Validated_Value: Poster size should not exceed 45 high by 72" wide (114.3 cm high by 182.9 cm wide). The poster board is sized 48" high by 72" wide; with a 1-2" metal frame. Reducing the poster a few inches allows it to mount flat without the edges curling. The HRS Poster Template is designed to maintain the 16:9 aspect ratio needed for the ePoster. It can be printed at 38.3" high x 68" wide or 36" high x 64" wide. Pre-formatted templates are available for download and include over 40 built-in color themes."
